title: ColdVault Policy
description: Canonical policy/config surface for append-only ColdVault logging.

hash_algorithm.description: Hash chaining algorithm for vault lines. Runtime implementation uses SHA-256 chain.

store_payload.description: Whether payload bytes are stored directly. Current pipeline stores payload digest for events.

include_signature.description: Whether signatures are included in stored payload material.

time_source.description: Timestamp source policy: use BFT runtime hint when available, fallback to clock pre-quorum.
